name: WeaverRidge Golf Club
about: WeaverRidge Golf Club offers an indoor golf simulator space known as SLICE. It is open to the public and provides access to its 4.5 Star Rated Championship Course both on the range and indoors. The venue features two curved, wide-screen About Golf simulators and provides an environment for year-round golf, practice, and social gatherings. It also offers facilities for golf instruction, dining, and events, catering to both individual players and groups seeking a comprehensive golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf year-round regardless of weather conditions
Professional golf instruction and coaching are available on-site
The space is ideal for private parties and corporate events
The full-service restaurant and bar enhance the social experience

food_and_drink.notes: SLICE features homemade pizza and a great variety of appetizers and sandwiches.
The restaurant and bar services are available, serving drinks to patrons.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two curved, wide-screen simulators are featured in the SLICE space.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full-service restaurant and bar with homemade pizza, appetizers, and sandwiches.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulator session typically takes around 1 to 1.5 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, WeaverRidge is family-friendly, offering a welcoming atmosphere for all ages, including children.
